objective: Reduce wall-clock time for checking all enabled RuTracker movie cards without increasing check errors or weakening result correctness

forbidden_actions: Do not change the metric, parser, eval command, locked fixtures, or baseline data during candidate loops.
Do not change movie enabled state, stored queries, per-item filters, credentials, or max_search_pages during baseline/candidate comparison.
Do not skip enabled items, weaken filtering, suppress check errors, reduce retry semantics, or use cached RuTracker responses only to improve timing.
Do not run candidate experiments before the metric contract and baseline are explicitly locked and the study is explicitly started.

title: Speed up check all movies
